---
title: "Sites - Rede C2"
subtitle: "Permanent plots for understanding Caatinga and Cerrado dynamics"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: auto
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - ../figures/
  - ../_input_data/
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

find_up <- function(rel_path, start = getwd(), max_levels = 8) {
  d <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  for (i in 0:max_levels) {
    cand <- file.path(d, rel_path)
    if (file.exists(cand)) return(cand)
    parent <- dirname(d)
    if (identical(parent, d)) break
    d <- parent
  }
  NA_character_
}
```

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
```

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --rc2-red: #A93632;
  --rc2-red-dark: #6E1F1D;
  --rc2-green: #626A38;
  --rc2-green-dark: #2E3B24;
  --rc2-green-soft: #D7DDC5;
  --rc2-ochre: #D99A27;
  --rc2-cream: #F6F1E8;
  --rc2-paper: #FFFDF7;
  --rc2-ink: #171717;
  --rc2-muted: #675F55;
  --rc2-line: rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  --rc2-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);

  --rc2-safe-gutter: clamp(0.75rem, 2.6vw, 2.25rem);
  --rc2-content-max: 1260px;
  --rc2-wide-max: 1480px;
  --rc2-xl-max: 1560px;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }

html,
body {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0 !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.90), rgba(246,241,232,0.86)),
    url("../figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: cover;
  background-attachment: fixed;
  background-position: center top;
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

img, video, iframe, svg, canvas { max-width: 100%; }
a { color: var(--rc2-red); }

#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content,
main,
main.content,
.page-columns,
.page-columns .content {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
}

main.content {
  background: transparent;
  width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 0 3.5rem 0 !important;
}

.quarto-title-block,
#title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Navbar */
.navbar {
  box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.navbar .navbar-brand,
.navbar .nav-link {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

.navbar .nav-link.active-section {
  color: var(--rc2-red) !important;
  font-weight: 800;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--rc2-red);
}

/* =========================================================
   HERO — PADRÃO HOME / PROTOCOLS
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-page-hero {
  position: relative;
  width: 100vw;
  max-width: 100vw;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
  margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
  min-height: clamp(620px, 88vh, 880px);
  display: grid;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  isolation: isolate;
  color: #fff;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 14%, rgba(217,154,39,0.38), transparent 28%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 82%, rgba(169,54,50,0.26), transparent 36%),
    linear-gradient(108deg, rgba(23,23,23,0.84) 0%, rgba(46,59,36,0.82) 42%, rgba(110,31,29,0.72) 100%),
    url("../figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.rc2-page-hero::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.40) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 46%, rgba(0,0,0,0.56) 100%),
    repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.055) 0 1px, transparent 1px 16px);
}

.rc2-page-hero::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 5px;
  z-index: 1;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--rc2-ochre) 0%, var(--rc2-red) 50%, var(--rc2-green) 100%);
}

.rc2-page-hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  width: min(1360px, calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: clamp(4.8rem, 8vw, 7.5rem) 0 clamp(3rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(240px, 0.36fr);
  gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
  align-items: center;
}

.rc2-kicker {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.82rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.24);
  color: var(--rc2-ochre);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.9vw, 0.76rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.7s ease both;
}

.rc2-kicker::before {
  content: "";
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--rc2-ochre);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(217,154,39,0.28);
}

.rc2-page-hero h1 {
  margin: 0.7rem 0 0;
  max-width: 1020px;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: clamp(4rem, 10vw, 9.6rem);
  line-height: 0.78;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.10em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-shadow: 0 10px 42px rgba(0,0,0,0.54);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.1s ease both;
}

.rc2-title-line {
  display: block;
}

.rc2-title-line:nth-child(2) {
  margin-left: clamp(1.6rem, 8vw, 6.8rem);
}

.rc2-title-rule {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 1.05rem 0 1.25rem;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.2s ease both;
}

.rc2-title-rule::before {
  content: "";
  flex: 0 0 clamp(36px, 5vw, 72px);
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--rc2-ochre);
  border-radius: 2px;
}

.rc2-title-rule::after {
  content: "";
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
}

.rc2-page-hero p {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.94);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.9vw, 1.38rem);
  line-height: 1.58;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.42);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.28s ease both;
}

/* Keywords slim */
.rc2-keywords {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin: 1.2rem 0 0;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.36s ease both;
}

.rc2-keyword {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 36px;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.78rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(23,23,23,0.46);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.26);
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.93);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.78vw, 0.72rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.09em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
}

.rc2-keyword--red   { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-red); }
.rc2-keyword--green { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-green-soft); }
.rc2-keyword--ochre { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-ochre); }
.rc2-keyword--cream { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-cream); }

/* Logo card */
.rc2-hero-logo-card {
  align-self: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.8rem);
  border-radius: 28px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.18);
  box-shadow:
    0 22px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.20),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.18s ease both;
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card img {
  width: clamp(94px, 10vw, 150px);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.36));
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.15);
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.78);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(0.86rem, 1.15vw, 0.98rem);
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* =========================================================
   SEÇÕES
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-section,
.content-card {
  width: min(var(--rc2-content-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 2.4rem auto 0;
  padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(217,154,39,0.08), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.96), rgba(246,241,232,0.88));
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  border-top: 5px solid var(--rc2-green);
  box-shadow: var(--rc2-shadow);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.rc2-section--wide {
  width: min(var(--rc2-wide-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
}

.rc2-section-title {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
}

.rc2-section-title::before {
  content: "";
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--rc2-ink);
  opacity: 0.72;
}

.rc2-section-title h2 {
  margin: 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  color: var(--rc2-red);
  font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.1rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-lead,
.lead {
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0 !important;
  padding-left: 1rem;
  border-left: 5px solid var(--rc2-ochre);
  color: #191711 !important;
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.3rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.65 !important;
}

.rc2-section p,
.content-card p {
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  line-height: 1.72;
}

.rc2-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 280px), 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}

.rc2-grid-3 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 260px), 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}

.rc2-card,
.info-box {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.84);
  border: 1px solid var(--rc2-line);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.065);
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.rc2-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.30);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.rc2-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.7rem 0;
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.11em;
  line-height: 1.25;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--rc2-muted);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* =========================================================
   CAROUSEL
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-carousel-shell {
  width: min(var(--rc2-wide-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 2.4rem auto 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 28px;
  box-shadow: var(--rc2-shadow);
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.84);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
}

.rc2-carousel-track {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  width: max-content;
  padding: 1rem;
  animation: rc2-marquee 54s linear infinite;
}

.rc2-carousel-shell:hover .rc2-carousel-track {
  animation-play-state: paused;
}

.rc2-carousel-img {
  width: clamp(260px, 28vw, 450px);
  height: 240px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.13);
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.rc2-carousel-img:hover {
  transform: scale(1.035);
}

@keyframes rc2-marquee {
  0% { transform: translateX(0); }
  100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

/* =========================================================
   MAP
   ========================================================= */
.leaflet-container {
  border-radius: 24px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

.leaflet-control,
.leaflet-bar,
.leaflet-control-layers {
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22) !important;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96) !important;
}

.leaflet-popup-content-wrapper {
  border-radius: 18px !important;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.98) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.24) !important;
}

.popup-card { max-width: 330px; }

.popup-title {
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem 0;
}

.popup-sub {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.64rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #7A5A18;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.popup-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  margin: 0.22rem 0;
}

.popup-k {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #7A5A18;
}

.popup-v { color: #312719; }

.map-note {
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--rc2-muted);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}

.map-warning {
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: rgba(169,54,50,0.08);
  border: 1px dashed rgba(169,54,50,0.35);
  color: var(--rc2-red-dark);
}

/* =========================================================
   ANIMAÇÕES
   ========================================================= */
@keyframes fadeSlideUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.reveal-ready {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(42px);
  transition: opacity 0.72s ease, transform 0.72s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);
  transition-delay: var(--reveal-delay, 0ms);
  will-change: opacity, transform;
}

.reveal-ready.is-visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .reveal-ready {
    opacity: 1 !important;
    transform: none !important;
    transition: none !important;
  }
}

/* =========================================================
   RESPONSIVO
   ========================================================= */
@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .rc2-page-hero-inner {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .rc2-hero-logo-card {
    max-width: 420px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .rc2-section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .rc2-page-hero {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .rc2-page-hero h1 {
    font-size: clamp(3.3rem, 17vw, 6rem);
  }

  .rc2-title-line:nth-child(2) {
    margin-left: 0;
  }

  .rc2-carousel-shell {
    border-radius: 20px;
  }

  .rc2-carousel-img {
    width: 82vw;
    height: 210px;
  }

  .rc2-section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 420px) {
  :root { --rc2-safe-gutter: 0.65rem; }

  .rc2-section,
  .content-card {
    padding: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.35rem);
    border-radius: 22px;
  }
}

.html-widget,
.leaflet,
.leaflet-container,
iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-page-hero" id="sites-hero" aria-label="RedeC2 sites hero">
  <div class="rc2-page-hero-inner">

    <div>
      <div class="rc2-kicker">Permanent plots · Caatinga + Cerrado</div>

      <h1>
        <span class="rc2-title-line">Sites</span>
        <span class="rc2-title-line">& gradients</span>
      </h1>

      <div class="rc2-title-rule" aria-hidden="true"></div>

      <p>
        Explore Rede C2 field sites and the environmental gradients connecting
        dry forests, savannas, soils and seasonality.
      </p>

      <div class="rc2-keywords" aria-label="Site keywords">
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--red">Caatinga</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--green">Cerrado</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--ochre">Permanent plots</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--cream">Interactive map</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <aside class="rc2-hero-logo-card" aria-label="RedeC2 sites identity">
      <img src="../figures/logoc2.png" alt="RedeC2 logo">
      <div class="rc2-hero-logo-card-divider"></div>
      <p>Spatial structure, plot metadata and environmental context.</p>
    </aside>

  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<div class="rc2-carousel-shell" aria-label="Rede C2 site image carousel">
  <div class="rc2-carousel-track">
    <img src="../figures/canudos_dc.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Canudos" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/gruta_brejoes_dc.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Gruta dos Brejões" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/s_francisco_dc.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="São Francisco" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/agua_limpa.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/itirapina.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Itirapina" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/agua_limpa_1.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa landscape" loading="lazy" decoding="async">

    <img src="../figures/canudos_dc.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Canudos" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/gruta_brejoes_dc.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Gruta dos Brejões" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/s_francisco_dc.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="São Francisco" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/agua_limpa.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/itirapina.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Itirapina" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
    <img src="../figures/agua_limpa_1.jpg" class="rc2-carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa landscape" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="mapa">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Interactive map</h2></div>

  <p class="rc2-lead">
    Use the map to inspect Rede C2 permanent plots, vegetation classification,
    plot area, census number and climatic or institutional metadata available
    in the project table.
  </p>
```

```{r}
library(htmltools)

csv_path <- find_up(file.path("_input_data", "plotMetadata_R2C.csv"))

if (is.na(csv_path)) {
  HTML('<div class="map-warning">The file <strong>_input_data/plotMetadata_R2C.csv</strong> was not found. Keep this file in the project root to render the interactive map.</div>')
} else {
  library(leaflet)
  library(dplyr)

  plotMetadata_R2C <- read.csv(csv_path)

  plotMetadata_R2C$biome <- "Unclassified"
  plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$kyle_veg_broad == "Forest"] <- "Caatinga"
  plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$kyle_veg_broad == "Savanna"] <- "Cerrado"
  plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$plot_id %in% c("CIP-21", "CIP-22", "CIP-23", "PNP-04")] <- "Cerrado"

  plotMetadata_R2C$longitude[plotMetadata_R2C$longitude > 0] <- -plotMetadata_R2C$longitude[plotMetadata_R2C$longitude > 0]
  plotMetadata_R2C$latitude[plotMetadata_R2C$latitude > 0] <- -plotMetadata_R2C$latitude[plotMetadata_R2C$latitude > 0]

  pal <- colorFactor(
    c("#A93632", "#626A38", "#D99A27"),
    domain = c("Caatinga", "Cerrado", "Unclassified")
  )

  popup_html <- paste0(
    '<div class="popup-card">',
    '<div class="popup-title">', htmlEscape(plotMetadata_R2C$plot_id), '</div>',
    '<div class="popup-sub">', htmlEscape(plotMetadata_R2C$biome), '</div>',
    '<div class="popup-row"><span class="popup-k">Area</span><span class="popup-v">', htmlEscape(plotMetadata_R2C$plot_area), ' ha</span></div>',
    '<div class="popup-row"><span class="popup-k">Census</span><span class="popup-v">', htmlEscape(plotMetadata_R2C$n_census), '</span></div>',
    '<div class="popup-row"><span class="popup-k">BIO12</span><span class="popup-v">', htmlEscape(plotMetadata_R2C$bio12), '</span></div>',
    '<div class="popup-row"><span class="popup-k">PI</span><span class="popup-v">', htmlEscape(plotMetadata_R2C$prinv), '</span></div>',
    '</div>'
  )

  leaflet(
    data = plotMetadata_R2C,
    width = "100%",
    height = 720,
    options = leafletOptions(minZoom = 2, maxZoom = 22)
  ) %>%
    addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron, group = "Light") %>%
    addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldImagery, group = "Satellite") %>%
    addProviderTiles(providers$OpenTopoMap, group = "Topo") %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      ~longitude,
      ~latitude,
      radius = 7,
      stroke = TRUE,
      weight = 2,
      color = "#FFFDF7",
      fillColor = ~pal(biome),
      fillOpacity = 0.92,
      label = ~paste0(plot_id, " · ", biome),
      popup = popup_html,
      group = "Plots"
    ) %>%
    addLayersControl(
      baseGroups = c("Light", "Satellite", "Topo"),
      overlayGroups = c("Plots"),
      position = "bottomleft",
      options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    addLegend(
      "bottomright",
      pal = pal,
      values = ~biome,
      title = "Vegetation",
      opacity = 0.9
    )
}
```

```{=html}
  <p class="map-note">
    Tip: keep the image carousel light by using optimized WebP/JPG versions
    and only load high-resolution images when necessary.
  </p>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="gradients">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>How to read the network</h2></div>

  <div class="rc2-grid-3">
    <article class="rc2-card">
      <h3>Spatial coverage</h3>
      <p>
        Sites are distributed across formations and regions that capture
        ecological turnover in dry ecosystems.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-card">
      <h3>Environmental gradients</h3>
      <p>
        Climate, soil, vegetation structure and landscape context should be
        interpreted jointly with plot-level data.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="rc2-card">
      <h3>Long-term comparability</h3>
      <p>
        Repeated censuses make it possible to connect local dynamics with
        broad-scale ecological patterns.
      </p>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll(
    ".rc2-section, .content-card, .rc2-page-hero, .rc2-carousel-shell, .team-controls, .team-card"
  );

  revealTargets.forEach((el, index) => {
    el.classList.add("reveal-ready");
    el.style.setProperty("--reveal-delay", `${Math.min(index, 8) * 45}ms`);
  });

  if (
    window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches ||
    !("IntersectionObserver" in window)
  ) {
    revealTargets.forEach(el => el.classList.add("is-visible"));
  } else {
    const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add("is-visible");
          revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px" });

    revealTargets.forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));
  }

  const sections = document.querySelectorAll("section[id]");
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar a[href]");

  if (sections.length && "IntersectionObserver" in window) {
    const navObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

        const id = entry.target.id;

        navLinks.forEach(link => {
          const href = link.getAttribute("href") || "";
          link.classList.toggle("active-section", href.endsWith("#" + id));
        });
      });
    }, { rootMargin: "-35% 0px -55% 0px", threshold: 0 });

    sections.forEach(section => navObserver.observe(section));
  }
});
</script>
```
